characters.name: Andy MacDonald
characters.description: Andy MacDonaldGenderMaleHairDark brownHometownMelrose, MassachusettsOccupationSkateboarder Andy Macdonald(born July 31, 1973) is an American professionalskateboarderinRocket Power. As of September 2013, he holds the record for the most X Games medals invert skateboardingand won the World Cup Skateboarding competition eight times. He represented Great Britain at the 2024 Olympic Games.

characters.name: Animal
characters.description: AnimalGenderMaleHairBrownHometownOcean ShoresFriendsLars, Pi, SputzAnimal with Pi and Sputz. Animalis one ofLars' friends along withPi PistonandSputz Ringley.  Animal didn't start appearing with the gang until the second season.  His first appearance was in the episode, "Say Hello to Cement Head," where he was simply seen in the background often atMadtown Skatepark.  There was never an episode welcoming him to Lar's group and there was never an explanation.  It can likely be assumed he was added so that Lars' group could have four kids just likeOtto,Reggie,Twister, andSamare a group of four, especially when playing street hockey. Animal is clearly not his real name, but it is the nickname he is given.  We never get to know Animal's real name.  He does talk occasionally but is usually just there with the group not doing much.

characters.name: Automated Voice
characters.description: Theautomated voiceis a character that appears in "Reggie's Big (Beach) Break".

characters.name: Bearded man
characters.description: The Bearded Man, enjoying somevegemiteduring the flight to New Zealand. [REWORK THIS PAGE] Every so often you would find this short, balding senior man with a full white beard and wearing a Basque beret in different places throughout Ocean Shores: strolling on the boardwalk, fishing off the Pier, dining at the Shack, exiting the Ortega Theatre, even floating around in the surf on an inner tube. He even managed to make the trip to New Zealand! But, he has never spoken a word on camera. For quite some time he remained a mystery to RP fans, more as concerned his significance than his identity.

characters.name: Bob Miller
characters.description: Bob MillerGenderMaleHairBrownAge60s (At the time of the episode)HometownChicago, IllinoisOccupationFormer Sportscaster, Retired Now Bob Millerwas a play by play sportscaster for the Los Angeles Kings hockey team.  He also was the announcer duringOcean Shore's NHL Breakout event. Bob Miller played himself and was un-named in the episode, "Power Play."  He would have been in his 60s at the time of this episode.

characters.name: Bree Copele
characters.description: Bree CopeleGenderFemaleHairBlondeAge30s-40sOccupationSunset Surf Representative Bree Copele(aka 'Breezy') is a representative for the athletic apparel companySunset Surf. She is shown to have a very thin body type, blonde hair, high cheek bones, and a mole on one side of her face.

characters.name: Bruce
characters.description: BruceGenderMaleHairWhiskersEyesSealy eyedHometownPacific OceanOccupationBeing an ex-seal-lent  harbor seal.RelativesOther seals.FriendsOther seals and Twister.StatusA seal of approval. Bruceis a harbor seal named byTwisterin the episode, "The Good Housekeeping Seal."  Twister and his friends became buddies with a seal at a beach several miles north ofthe pierand away fromOcean Shoresproper. Twister contemplates on naming him either Walter or Bruce, but chooses Bruce.Lt. Tice Ryantells the kids to leave the seal alone as it is a wild creature, but disregarding his demands, Twister feeds the seal. The seal follows Twister back to Ocean Shores where he and Twister reunite. Twister does his best to hide the creature from authority, all while sharing it with his friends.  Finally after a day with the seal, Twister learns he needs to return the seal to the ocean and he does so.  Overall it was an ex-seal-lent day.

characters.name: Burraamundi Bot
characters.description: TheBurraamundi Botis the first boss of the gameRocket Power: Beach Bandits The Burraamundi Bot is a giant purple shark robot. The tail of this massive shark has a fan for maneuverability. There is also a robot head above the shark head, serving as its weak point.

characters.name: Card Shop Owner
characters.description: Card Shop OwnerGenderMaleHairWhite-GrayAge50s-60sHometownOcean ShoresOccupationCard Shop Owner TheCard Shop Owneris the owner of theCard Shop, a business located on theOcean ShoresBoardwalk.  His name is never mentioned in the episode and in the credits he is listed as "Shop Owner." He has a significant role in the episode, "Card Sharked" when he helpsReggieandSampull a trick onOtto.  He follows along with their plan and tricks Otto andTwisterinto believing a piece of cardboard is worth a lot of money.  The whole ploy is to get Otto to admit he cheated his best friend Twister, of a real good trading card for a piece of empty cardboard.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: CarlGenderMaleHairBlackAge20s or early 30sOccupationSki & Snowboard Instructor Carlis the instructor of a ski and snowboard group for children with special needs atMount BaldyResort. Carl himself has no leg beyond his knee.  He has special equipment to allow him to ski. He is shown to be laid back and kind with the other children in the group.  He seems to have a close and friendly relationship withLizzie.   He appears in the episode, "Radical New Equipment."

characters.name: Carla
characters.description: Carlawas the lead character in episode 9A of season 4, titled "New Girl on the Block." According toTVRage, "Reggiemakes friends with a new girl named Carla," who was voiced by Alison Inconstanti. Reggie was curious as to why Carla, a good skater, showed up in town pretty much unnoticed.  The gang investigated and found that Carla was living in a homeless shelter.  The story dealt with Carla's (initially) suspicious reaction to Reggie's wanting to help her, and how she ultimately became friends with the Rocket crew.

characters.name: Chester McGill
characters.description: Chester McGillGenderMaleHairBrownAge40sHometownUnknownOccupationChairman of Waikikamukau raceRelativesTheodore McGill (son) Chester McGillis a former extreme athlete residing in New Zealand. He's the Chairman of the Waikikamukau race, and the main antagonist of Rocket Power:Race Across New Zealand. He's obsessed with having his sonTheodore McGillfollow in his footsteps by winning the Prince Waikikamukau competition by any means necessary. In the first Prince Waikikamukau competition,Raymundocompeted against Chester and Ray was on the verge of winning the final event of the competition which was a down hill skiing race. But just as Ray was about to win, Chester suddenly appeared in front of Ray at the finish line and won 1st place and the Prince Waikikamukau competition. Ray is bitter about the loss years later and is convinced that Chester must have cheated during that race.

But just as Ray was about to win, Chester suddenly appeared in front of Ray at the finish line and won 1st place and the Prince Waikikamukau competition. Ray is bitter about the loss years later and is convinced that Chester must have cheated during that race.

characters.name: Chris Klebecky
characters.description: Chris KlebeckyGenderMaleHairOrange/BrownHometownOcean Shores Chris Klebeckyis a student at the same school asOtto,Twister,Reggie, andSam.  He is a minor character who can be seen in the background occasionally.  He was notably seen with a voiced line in the episode, "Sam: King of Kickball," where at the time of this episode taking place, he had injured his leg and had to use crutches.

characters.name: Clutch Koerner
characters.description: Clutch KoernerGenderMaleHairBrownRelativesKam Koerner (dad)Clutch and his father Kam. Clutch Koerneris the son of legendary surfer,Kam Koerner.  Clutch knows the Rocket's through various meet ups over the years.  He has somewhat of a competitive streak against Otto and visa versa, both wanting to be the best.  ArguablyOttotakes it too far though. Clutch is shown to be somewhat boastful with a touch of pride, but he is also shown having a good time with others and being friendly. He first appears in the episode, "Legends and Their Falls."  He is voiced by late 90s, early 2000s musical sensation, Aaron Carter.

characters.name: Conroy Blanc
characters.description: Conroy BlancGenderMaleHairBrownAge30sOccupationMad Town Operator / Elementary School Teacher Conroy Blanc(also known asMr. BorMr. Blanc) is an adult character of Jamaican heritage who speaks with a Caribbean accent. A skater of some renown, he is the resident caretaker ofMadtown Skateparkas well as a teacher at a local school. Conroy also goes by "Mr. B" or "Mr. Blanc" when working as a full-time teacher atOcean Shores Elementary School, where he got a position left vacant by the retirement of the previous fourth grade teacher. Now Conroy teaches in the class attended byOttoandTwister.

characters.name: Cyrax
characters.description: Cyrax meeting Rocket Children. Cyraxis a supercomputer inBeach Bandits. Serve as a second boss in levelWishing Waters. Cyrax is loyal to the Golem Industries. Cyrax is loyal to the Golem Industries. Cyrax is voiced byJohn Kassirin a manner similar to Douglas Rain's reading of HAL9000 from 1968's ''2001: A Space Oddysey.''

characters.name: Danielle Rocket
characters.description: Danielle RocketGenderFemaleHairAuburn redAgeLikely 30s (deceased)HometownOcean ShoresRelativesRaymundo Rocket(husband)Reggie Rocket(daughter)Otto Rocket(son)FriendsNoelani (best friend)TitoWild BillStatusDeceased Danielle "Danni" Rocket(maiden name unknown) is the late mother ofReggieandOtto Rocket, who died when they were very little, wasRaymundo's first wife. Her given name is a female variant of the Hebrew name "Daniel", which means "God is my judge". Most of what we know about Danielle--including her appearance and her given name, which were unknown to us for a very long time--was learned inIsland of the Menehune, very late in the series' run. That she had passed away some time before the series time frame had earlier been hinted at inRocket X-mas, but in that episode she was not referred to by name.

characters.name: Delivery Woman
characters.description: Delivery WomanGenderFemaleHairBrownAge30s-40sOccupationLightning Sport delivery driver TheDelivery Womanis an un-named woman who works as a delivery driver forLightning Sport.  She is shown to be somewhat rude and disrespectful, especially toOtto.  Even though Otto is asking for free hand outs, her behavior doesn't warrant the rudeness she showed. She is voiced by Margaret Smith.

characters.name: Dick Shakely
characters.description: Dick ShakelyAge40sHairOrangeGenderMale Dick Shakely(voiced byJon Favreau) works forSno-Martas the representative and team manager from the company who finds talent to sponsor.  He supplies talent with the company's latest gear and technology and expects the talent to excel. He is shown to have anger problems when things are not going his way and talent lets him down. He appears in the episodeOtto 3000. Initially, Dick Shakely seems very friendly and helpful. When things are going well with a customer or a sponsored client, he has a cheery attitude and acts very generous. However, this is simply a facade to help him make business deals. In reality, Dick is an impatient, callous, unreasonable, inconsiderate, self-serving, bully with anger issues. His shows no care for his clients' safety or well-being, only that the Sno-Mart brand looks good. He's intolerant of basic human failure, but also unable, lacking or unwilling to understand slowing a boarder down by making them wear heavy clothes will cause it. He's also too stupid to realize making Otto wear multiple Sno-Mart shirts is pointless as people will only see his jacket anyway. His partnership with Otto ends with Dick violently throwing a tantrum, grabbing his board back and stomping away when Otto rejected the sponsorship. Initially, Dick Shakely seems very friendly and helpful. When things are going well with a customer or a sponsored client, he has a cheery attitude and acts very generous. However, this is simply a facade to help him make business deals. In reality, Dick is an impatient, callous, unreasonable, inconsiderate, self-serving, bully with anger issues. His shows no care for his clients' safety or well-being, only that the Sno-Mart brand looks good. He's intolerant of basic human failure, but also unable, lacking or unwilling to understand slowing a boarder down by making them wear heavy clothes will cause it. He's also too stupid to realize making Otto wear multiple Sno-Mart shirts is pointless as people will only see his jacket anyway. His partnership with Otto ends with Dick violently throwing a tantrum, grabbing his board back and stomping away when Otto rejected the sponsorship. After the events ofOtto 3000, Dick is never seen or heard from again, despite the Sno-Mart store and equipment occasionally appearing in background shots. It's possible Dick was fired due to his anger issues, or his general lack of competence. Notably, Dick's harsh dismissal of Otto was in public and recorded on video.

characters.name: Donna Lightning
characters.description: Donna LightningHairBrownGenderFemale Donna Lightningis the name of a character in theSkate Warsfilms and it may also be her real name, though she is also calledStunt GirlorDonna.  She serves asDonnie Lightning'sstunt skater.  She later replaced him as the main star as the film's director has a change of plans.
